title: Unnamed Monster
description: Adds items and monsters from Monster Hunter.
body:
**+ This Mod Requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) to work +**

**+ Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Gs2mPuzpvM) to receive news! +**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wrbD8cwtw6Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This mod is based on Monster Hunter franchise by CapCom.**

Unnamed Monster introduces new bosses and creatures based on Monster Hunter monsters, along with custom monsters created by BitZero. Every Monster has different skills and stats that can be seen when fighting them. These monsteres drops items, and these items can be used to create equipment (tools & armor) from that monster, or can be usefull to upgrade monster tools to another level. There's pets that can help on gameplay or obtaining items.
This mod focus on exploration and "hunting" these monsters to upgrade the hunter tools and equipment to the max. The armors can be different on stats but every armor has a different unique status effect.

There are multiple items in Operator Tab in creative that can help people that wants to see every interaction possible with monsters.
## General Info

### Items
Items that can be obtained via Felyne harvest are mentioned below.

**Loot**:

Every monster has a unique loot and different items that can be obtained by killing them. For example, Great Girros can drop his scales, and Anjanath his fangs.

These items can help to create weapons, tools and armour that can help fighting other monsters. You can explore these items by killing the monsters. Some items are rarer than others, this can be seen in the description of the items.

**Special**:

<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- Antidote: Removes Poison & Wither.
- Attack Charm: Gives Strength I.
- Carbalite Ingot: Material found on mines.
- Catalyst: Boosts Strength, Speed & Health Boost making it 1 level above.
- Energy Drink: Gives Speed & Saturation.
- Potion: Gives a little of regeneration
- Medium Potion: Gives more regeneration.
- Max Potion: Gives a lot of regeneration.
- Nutrients: Gives Health Boost.
- Raw Carbalite: Found in mines from height 0 to 64.

</details>



### Weapon Types
Beside armors and basic tools, there's new types of weapons being these: Greatsword, Long Sword and Dual Blades.

These weapons have different and unique mechanics.

- **_Greatsword_**: Every Greatsword has a different chance to hit a Critical Hit, these criticals acts like a double-insta hit. If used while having a Shield in off-hand, it will inflict Weakness, Slowness and Mining Fatigue to the user.
- **_Long Sword_**: When right-clicking, it deals a lot of damage on a big area.
- **_Dual Blades_**: When using on main-hand and off-hand at the same time, Dual Blades grants a passive effect to the user. Also, when right-clicking it will use his off-hand blade to do a quick area-attack.
- **_Lance_**: If you Right-click it will make a Uppercut-Like skill, but when clicking it will execute a dash-like skill that deals area damage. Each one of these two skills sets a different cooldown on the weapon and can only be used if the cooldown is 0. If used while having a Shield in off-hand, it will inflict Slowness and Mining Fatigue to the user.
- **_Sword & Shield_**: Has a boost when holding any type of shield.

### Weapons & Armors
Weapons:

<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- **Buster Sword**: Acts like a basic Greatsword.
- **Jagras Blade**: Better version of Buster Sword.
- **Girro's Blade**: Can inflict Paralysis.
- **Malady's Kiss**: Can inflict Paralysis.
- **Finblade**: Can inflict Waterblight.
- **Bone Shotel**: Acts like a basic Long Sword.
- **Blazing Shotel**: His special attack causes Fireblight.
- **Anja Scimitar**: Can inflict Fireblight.
- **Matched Slicers**: Acts like a basic Dual Blade.
- **Usurper's Fulgur**: Can inflict Thunderblight.
- **Bone Lance**: Acts like a basic Lance.
- **Aqua Spear**: Stronger than Bone Lance.
- **Heat Edge Sword**: Made from Rathalos sources, it's very powerfull.

</details>

Armors:

<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- **Barroth Armor**: Made from Barroth loot, it makes the user inmune to Muddy.
- **Jade Barroth Armor**: Made with both Barroth and Jade Barroth loot, it makes the user inmune to Snowman.
- **Anja Armor**: Made from Anjanath loot, it makes the user inmune to Fire.

</details>


### Entities

<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- **Felyne**: Passive, more info below.
- **Seikret**: Passive, more info below.
- **Jagras**: Small, fast. Spawns in Sparse Jungle in packs of 3.
- **Girros**: Simple, but deadly. Spawns in Bamboo Jungle in packs from 2 to 4.
- **Gastodon**: Harder to hunt, requires iron. Spawns in Savanna.
- **Velociprey**: Attacks on groups. Spawns in Taiga in packs of 3.
- **Genprey**: Smaller but faster. Spawns in Savanna, Savanna Plateau or Windswept Savanna in packs of 3.
- **Giaprey**: Faster and stronger. Spawns in Snowy Taiga in packs of 4.
- **Great Jagras**: Acts as an introduction to the bigger monsters. Spawns in Swamps.
- **Great Girros**: Mini-boss monster, requires iron and his loot it's good. Spawns in Bamboo Jungle.
- **Bulldrome**: Good source of food. Can spawn in Savanna.
- **Jyuratodus**: Has a mud armour that can be destroyed after 10 hits. Spawns in Savanna, Savanna Plateau and Windswept Savanna.
- **Barroth**: Good resources, but a little hard to kill. Can spawn in Badlands, Eroded Badlands and Wooded Badlands.
- **Jade Barroth**: Better than Barroth, stronger and faster. Spawns in Snowy Beach and Snowy Plains.
- **Plesioth**: A deadly monster to hunt, requires enchanted iron or diamond. Spawns in Stony Shore.
- **Anjanath**: Harder, can get enraged. Spawns in Old Growth Pine Taiga.
- **Rathalos**: Stronger than most monsters. Spawns in Old Growth Pine Taiga.
- **Zinogre**: Can get enraged, being faster and stronger. Spawns in Old Growth Birch Forest.
- **Stygian Zinogre**: Better than Zinogre, and harder to kill. Spawns in Ice Spikes.

</details>
Some Monsters can also spawn as Albino and Melanistic variations.

Some monsters can also spawn on Nests, with special loot and entities with them.

Entities that can spawn on nests:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Bulldrome**: This nest spawns on Snowy Plains.
- **Great Girros**: This nest spawns on Jungle, Sparse Jungle and Bamboo Jungle.
- **Jyuratodus**: This nest spawns on Savanna, Wooded Badlands.
- **Barroth**: This nest spawns on Badlands, Eroded Badlands and Wooded Badlands.
- **Jade Barroth**: This nest spawns on Ice Spikes, Snowy Beach and Snowy Plains.
- **Anjanath**: This nest spawns on Old Growth Pine Taiga.
- **Rathalos**: This nest spawns on Old Growth Spruce Taiga.
- **Zinogre**: This nest spawns on Old Growth Birch Forest.
- **Stygian Zinogre**: This nest spawns on Ice Spikes.

</details>



### Status Effects

<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- **Dragonblight**: This effect makes the player weaker, decreasing his health and damage.
- **Fireblight**: Sets the player on fire.
- **Iceblight**: Freezes the player.
- **Muddy**: Makes the player attacks slower and makes the player slower in general. It can be removed by getting on water.
- **Paralysis**: Makes the player unable to move naturally. Can be removed by getting hit.
- **Sleep**: This effect causes the user to has less reach and knockback.
- **Snowman**: Reduces attack speed, knockback resistance and movement speed.
- **Thunderblight**: Makes the player able to get paralyzed on any chance.
- **Waterblight**: Makes the player saturation go to 0.

</details>


### Pets
- **Felyne**: The Felyne is a passive entity that can harvest different special and unique items from the ground when is tamed. Can be tamed with Tropical Fish. The items that a Felyne can harvest are: Ancient Bone, Boulder Bone, Sturdy Bone, Brutal Bone, Bitterbug, Antidote Herb, Blazenut, Raw Carbalite, Waterblock Seed, Firedouse Berry, Stormsender Seed, Dragonfell Berry. Felynes can be found on Felyne's Treehouse streecture on Sparse Jungle.
- **Seikret**: The Seikrets are mounts, can be tamed with Monster Beef or Antidote Herb and these fast creatures can help you exploring or hunting. When pressing Space (can be changed in controls) it will execute a front dash making the Seikret tired for a few seconds before being able to dash again.
### Misc
- Villager Trades: Villagers now can be Shopkeeper and Hunters with the new pedestals.
